# %05\_overview.md

%lang en

# Overview

AXC Labs is a liquidity protocol focused on tokenized alternative assets. Our infrastructure unlocks liquidity for traditionally illiquid assets, such as private credit and hedge fund products, enabling price discovery, on-chain composability and creation of new financial use cases.

%lang zh

# 概述

AXC Labs 是一家专注于代币化另类资产的流动性协议。我们的基础设施旨在解锁传统上流动性较差的资产的流动性，例如私募信贷和对冲基金产品，从而实现价格发现、链上可组合性以及创造新的金融应用场景。

# %10\_onboarding.md

# **Getting started with AXC**

To get started with the AXC protocol go to our website at [http://www.axc.xyz/](http://www.axc.xyz/)

The products using the AXC protocol are involve substantial risk and may not be suitable for all investors.  Before placing any funds with this protocol, potential investors should review the terms and conditions and the product descriptions placing particular attention on the risk factors for the products.

Depositing funds into the AXC protocol products involves this process

* Select the product you wish to purchase  
* Connect an ethereum wallet such as Metamask to the application  
* Subscribe to AXC product tokens with USDT  
* Receive tokens

Withdrawing funds into the AXC protocol products involves this process

* Select the product you wish to withdraw from  
* Connect an ethereum wallet such as Metamask to the application  
* Submit a withdrawal request.  If there is funding in the liquidity pool you will receive USDT immediately.  If the pool is empty withdraw requests will be filled from sales of the underlying

# %15\_grow.md

# **Growth Yield Token**

The Growth Yield Token (GYT) is a Regulation S digital security token issued under the laws of the Republic of Marshall Islands.  Under the United States Securities Exchange Commission taxonomy of [digital assets](https://www.sec.gov/newsroom/speeches-statements/corp-fin-statement-tokenized-securities-012826-statement-tokenized-securities), the Growth Yield Token is a third party-sponsored tokenized linked security but not a security-based swap.  The tokenization structure is designed to allow for users to exchange tokens in a permissionless manner allowing it to be used with defi lending pools and protocols.

The fund issuer has partnered up with AXC labs to unlock on-chain liquidity and on-chain composability. The fund of hedge funds is an OFC fund, domiciled in Hong Kong. Its investment strategy allocates capital to top-performing global hedge funds, including firms such as TCI, Citadel, Point72, Brevan Howard, and others.

The underlying fund manager GROW Investment Group has over 20 years of industry experience and has established strategic shareholder relationships with entities like Julius Baer and Lighthouse. The fund manager William Ma CFA CAIA: First Generational Fund of Hedge Fund Managers in Asia, Global board member at CAIA, Founder and CIO of GROW Investment Group (Backed Julius Baer & Lighthouse), Ex-CIO Noah Holdings (NYSE: Noah) 90B AUM China largest private wealth manager. 

## **Key facts** 

| Underlying Assets | Fund: GROW Heritage Fund (FoF) Entity: GROW Asset Management (HK) Limited |
| :---- | :---- |
| Estimated APY | 14% |
| Blockchain | BSC, Ethereum, Plume |
| Yield Type | Accumulating Token |
| Custodian | GoFintech Trust Limited (00290.HK); HK SFC Type 1,4,6 and 9 Licenses HK TCSP licensed (TC 007765\) |
| Fund Admin | WE services Limited |
| Fund Auditor | Advanced CPA Limited |
| NAV  | Official : Monthly Estimate: Real Time |
| Deposit | Minimum $10 |
| Transfer | Permissionless transferability |
| Exit | 1\. Instant withdrawal: GYT \<\> USDC/USDT 2\. Quarterly withdrawal: GYT \<\> USDC/USDT |
| Base Currency | USDC/USDT |
| Other Fees | 1\. Management Fee 2\. Instant or Quarterly Withdrawal Fee 3\. Performance Fee  |

## **Historic returns** 

According to historical performance from 2019 to 2025, the fund of funds recorded an annualized compound return of 17.86%, with an annualized volatility of 14.88%, a maximum drawdown of \-11.47% (-1.73% per year), and a Sharpe ratio of 1.91 (using SOFR as the risk-free rate). These figures outperform the annual return of the S\&P 500 Index.

![][image1]

|  | Grow Heritage Fund | S\&P 500 Benchmark |
| :---- | ----- | ----- |
| **Compound Annual Return** | 17.86% | 16.60% |
| **Annualized Volatility** | 14.88% | 16.95% |
| **Maximum Drawdown  (6 years)**  | \-11.47% | \-34.00% |
| **Sharpe Ratio** | 1.91 | 0.75 |

## **Portfolio**

![][image2]

## **Exposure**

GROW Heritage Fund adopts a Fund of Hedge Funds (FoHF) approach, investing in a curated selection of top-tier, low-correlation hedge funds worldwide. The objective is to capture scarce investment opportunities while optimizing risk through diversified strategy allocation.  
\-Equity Long/Short Strategies: Maintains both long and short equity positions to generate returns from both sides of the market while mitigating downside risk.  
\-Multi-Strategy Approach: Combines equity, macro, and arbitrage sub-strategies within a single fund, dynamically adjusting weights to adapt to market conditions.  
Relative Value Strategies: Exploits pricing inefficiencies between related assets, such as fixed-income arbitrage and volatility arbitrage.  
\-Global Macro Strategies: Utilizes a top-down, research-driven approach to identify macroeconomic opportunities, allocating across FX, equities, bonds, futures, and options, with flexible positioning to capture opportunities across asset classes.

![][image3]

# %16\_growwhite.md

# **Growth Yield Token \- Whitelisted**

The Growth Yield Token (GYT) is a Regulation S digital security token issued under the laws of the Republic of Marshall Islands.  Under the United States Securities Exchange Commission taxonomy of [digital assets](https://www.sec.gov/newsroom/speeches-statements/corp-fin-statement-tokenized-securities-012826-statement-tokenized-securities). The Growth Yield Token \-whitelisted is a third party-sponsored custodial tokenized security.   Because the whitelisted tokens correspond to ownership in the underlying product, the transferability of the tokens is limited and can be transferred only between pre-approved white listed wallets.  Hence these tokens are unsuitable for use in defi protocols.

Growth Yield Token Whitelist (GYTw) is a fund‑of‑hedge‑funds (RWA) product. The fund issuer has partnered up with AXC labs to issue a tokenised fund product. The Fund of Hedge fund is an OFC fund, domiciled in Hong Kong. Its investment strategy allocates capital to top‑performing global hedge funds, including firms such as TCI, Citadel, Point72, Brevan Howard, and others. The underlying fund manager Grow Investment Group has over 20 years of industry experience and has established strategic shareholder relationships with entities like Julius Baer and Lighthouse.

The fund issuer has partnered up with AXC labs to unlock on-chain liquidity and on-chain composability. The fund of hedge funds is an OFC fund, domiciled in Hong Kong. Its investment strategy allocates capital to top-performing global hedge funds, including firms such as TCI, Citadel, Point72, Brevan Howard, and others.

The underlying fund manager GROW Investment Group has over 20 years of industry experience and has established strategic shareholder relationships with entities like Julius Baer and Lighthouse. The fund manager William Ma CFA CAIA: First Generational Fund of Hedge Fund Managers in Asia, Global board member at CAIA, Founder and CIO of GROW Investment Group (Backed Julius Baer & Lighthouse), Ex-CIO Noah Holdings (NYSE: Noah) 90B AUM China largest private wealth manager. 

## **Key facts** 

| Underlying Assets | Fund: GROW Heritage Fund (FoF) Entity: GROW Asset Management (HK) Limited |
| :---- | :---- |
| Estimated APY | 14% |
| Blockchain | BSC, Ethereum, Plume |
| Yield Type | Accumulating Token |
| Custodian | GoFintech Trust Limited (00290.HK); HK SFC Type 1,4,6 and 9 Licenses HK TCSP licensed (TC 007765\) |
| Fund Admin | WE services Limited |
| Fund Auditor | Advanced CPA Limited |
| NAV  | Official : Monthly Estimate: Real Time |
| Deposit | Minimum $10 |
| Transfer | Permissionless transferability |
| Exit | 1\. Instant withdrawal: GYT \<\> USDC/USDT 2\. Quarterly withdrawal: GYT \<\> USDC/USDT |
| Base Currency | USDC/USDT |
| Other Fees | 1\. Management Fee 2\. Instant or Quarterly Withdrawal Fee 3\. Performance Fee  |

## **Historic returns** 

According to historical performance from 2019 to 2025, the fund of funds recorded an annualized compound return of 17.86%, with an annualized volatility of 14.88%, a maximum drawdown of \-11.47% (-1.73% per year), and a Sharpe ratio of 1.91 (using SOFR as the risk-free rate). These figures outperform the annual return of the S\&P 500 Index.

![][image4]

|  | Grow Heritage Fund | S\&P 500 Benchmark |
| :---- | ----- | ----- |
| **Compound Annual Return** | 17.86% | 16.60% |
| **Annualized Volatility** | 14.88% | 16.95% |
| **Maximum Drawdown  (6 years)**  | \-11.47% | \-34.00% |
| **Sharpe Ratio** | 1.91 | 0.75 |

## **Portfolio**

![][image5]

## **Exposure**

GROW Heritage Fund adopts a Fund of Hedge Funds (FoHF) approach, investing in a curated selection of top-tier, low-correlation hedge funds worldwide. The objective is to capture scarce investment opportunities while optimizing risk through diversified strategy allocation.  
\-Equity Long/Short Strategies: Maintains both long and short equity positions to generate returns from both sides of the market while mitigating downside risk.  
\-Multi-Strategy Approach: Combines equity, macro, and arbitrage sub-strategies within a single fund, dynamically adjusting weights to adapt to market conditions.  
Relative Value Strategies: Exploits pricing inefficiencies between related assets, such as fixed-income arbitrage and volatility arbitrage.  
\-Global Macro Strategies: Utilizes a top-down, research-driven approach to identify macroeconomic opportunities, allocating across FX, equities, bonds, futures, and options, with flexible positioning to capture opportunities across asset classes.

![][image6]

# %20\_deposit.md

# **Deposit options**

All deposits go through the same path by which the tokens are split into user wallet and underlying

AXC Labs may have a portion of the funds provided for purchase of the underlying to provide instant liquidity.   We will provide mechanisms by which holders of the tokens will be able to instantly convert tokens to stablecoins with a discount.  The mechanism by which we intended to provide additional liquidity

* We will set aside liquidity to redeem shares either through secondary Defi markets  
* We will arrange with the underlying fund facilities to perform instantaneous buybacks at a discount

### **Timelines for deposit**

The deposits are based on a monthly deposit period.  For in this example we will begin with a deposit period in January

1. **Deposit period opens:** Jan 1st \- January subscription period begins. Users submit purchase requests (e.g., subscribe for $10k, initial default $1k \= 10 shares).  
2. **Payment Completion:** Must be completed by Jan 15th.  
3. **Earnings Calculation Begins:** Starts Feb 1st (next month), using $1k default NAV.  *No earnings for remaining days in Jan.*  
4. **Monthly NAV Calculation & Disclosure:**  Calculated from Mar 1st, disclosed by Mar 20th. If 1% return, Feb NAV \= $1010. *User sees earnings for the first time here.*

# %21\_withdrawal.md

# **Withdrawal options**

AXC provides the following two option for withdrawing holdings

|  | Standard withdrawal to stablecoin | Instant exit to stablecoin |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Clients** | Available to token holders undergoing AML/KYC | Token addresses checked against standard black lists |
| **Speed** | Two months | One day |
| **Availability to clients** | Issuer obligated to provide this mechanism to vetted holders | No obligation to redeem.  Maybe unavailable due to market conditions |
| **Schedule** | Exit is available only once a quarter | No schedule limits but may be unavailable due to market conditions |
| **Price** | Tokens redeemed at NAV calculated by the underlying manager | No obligation to provide tokens at price.  May be redeemed at substantial haircut due to market conditions. |

### **Timelines for standard withdrawal to stablecoin**

*Standard exit requests processed only on Jan 1st, Apr 1st, Jul 1st, Oct 1st each year.*

1. **AXC Prepares withdrawal Request:** Apr window needs 60 business days notice (Jan 6th). AXC can initiate early, then adjust/cancel closer to April based on user request.  
2. **User Submits withdrawal Request:**  Jan purchasers can request redemption as early as Feb 1st, latest Mar 28th, to meet Apr 1st window.  
3. **Await Quarterly Processing Window:** Regardless of submission time, processing starts in April (1st of the quarter).  
4. **Calculate & Lock Settlement Price:** Apr 1st processing uses March NAV as final settlement price.  
5. **Confirm Monthly NAV:** Around Apr 20th, March NAV calculation complete (assuming 1% return, March NAV \= $1020.1). *Actual redemption amount known, funds processed.*  
6. **Funds Received:** Within \~15 calendar days after March NAV confirmation.

# %22\_liquidity.md

# Liquidity model

In order to provide liquidity the AXC protocol will reserve 10% of deposits as stablecoin.  This liquidity pool will be used to provide instant liquidity.

![][image7]

# %25\_pricing.md

%lang en

% Note that the text has not been translated into Chinese

# **Price discovery**

One essential part of the AXC protocol is to address the gap between the needs of token holders and the realities of alternative assets when it comes to pricing.  Token holders require pricing which is precise, timely, simple, transparent, and complete whereas the reality of alternative assets is that the pricing of the underlying is none of these things.  The table below describes the gap between token needs and underlying reality when it comes to pricing.

|  | Token holder expectations | Alternative assets realities |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Precision** | Token holders expect prices which are precise and which allow the token holder to immediately calculate the price of a token.  Before an exchange, the token holder needs to know the exact amount to be bid or asked, and the execution of the order is instantaneous.  | Prices of alternative assets are usually not stated with precision and the process of buying and selling alternative assets typically may involve haggling and negotiation.    |
| **Timeliness** | Token holders expect instant pricing with the gap between order and pricing measured in milliseconds.  Because tokens have instant pricing, token holders can use prices to formulate trading strategies and use tokens as collateral.  | Prices of alternative assets can take weeks to calculate after a transaction, and may be unavailable at the time of the transaction.  |
| **Complexity** | Token holders expect that a token will have a single price from which one can easily calculate time series | Alternative assets may have investments divided into several internal classes with different prices which makes deriving a single price difficult  |
| **Transparency** | Token holders expect a complete time series of transactions and full historical information on all trades  | Alternative assets are reluctant to provide high frequency trading information in order to prevent strategies from being replicated.  |

The goal of the AXC protocol is to satisfy the requirements of token holders by creating a liquid market to generate prices.  However this creates a chicken and egg problem as price discovery is necessary to create liquid markets and liquid markets are necessary to create accurate prices.  In order to resolve this dilemma we have taken a two step approach to create a set of bootstrap prices whose purpose is then to create sufficient liquidity to generate prices.  The two steps are

* Create a settlement model to remove the complexity for alternative assets  
* Compute a bootstrap price which will be used as an initial price

We provide the technical details of the settlement model and the bootstrap mode below

# %26\_pricing\_model.md

%lang en

# **Pricing model**

Once we have removed the complexity of the underlying asset, we will need to create a bootstrap price that will serve as the initial bid or ask price for the token.  The price that is calculated from this model should not be considered the final or most accurate price for the asset, but rather is a rough initial guess which can be refined by market and trading activities.

The current value of the token is jointly anchored by the on-chain reserve pool and the off-chain underlying assets; therefore, the token's price cannot be determined solely by the off-chain assets. A reasonable calculation method is:

$$Price\_{token}=\\frac{Value\_{onchain}+Value\_{offchain}}{Supply\_{token}}$$

The token price is jointly determined by the project's net asset value (on-chain \+ off-chain) and the token supply. The on-chain value is calculated as follows:

$$Value\_{onchain} \= Shares\_{protocol} \* Price\_{protocol} \+ Extra\_{protocol}$$

Where the protocol share represents the proportion of the reserve pool that is staked in DeFi protocols, the protocol price is the price provided by the third-party protocol, and the protocol's additional income is optional (some protocols provide additional reward tokens in addition to the basic staking income).

$$Value\_{offchain} \= Rwa\_{estimated} \+ Rwa\_{pending}$$

The off-chain value is calculated as follows: The off-chain value is determined by the estimated RWA net value and the amount of unprocessed RWA subscriptions (the amount of funds withdrawn from the on-chain by the administrator each period, which has not yet been allocated to the actual RWA value). The off-chain RWA value is no longer updated daily, but is based on the annualized return of the underlying asset to derive the daily return rate r, and the estimated RWA value after t days is calculated as follows:

$$ r \= ( 1 \+ APY)^{\\frac{t}{365}} \- 1 $$

When the APY is in the range of 7% \- 14.4%, the daily return rate is 0.0185% \- 0.0369%.

Calculate the estimated value of RWA after t days under compound interest.

$$ Rwa\_{estimated} \= Rwa\_{value} \* (1 \+ r)^t \= Rwa\_{value} \* ( 1 \+ APY)^{\\frac{1}{365}} $$

The net value of RWA will be updated and calibrated once a month. At other times, the off-chain RWA estimated value will be calculated based on the difference between the current time and the last calibration time, as well as the set estimated annual rate.

## **Special cases**

For funds withdrawing in a 3-month queue, the off-chain RWA net value will be updated during the repayment period when the funds are burned into tokens. At this time, the RWA net value is as follows:

$$ Rwa\_{newvalue} \= Rwa\_{oldvalue} \* (1 \+ APY)^{\\frac{1}{365}} \- Value\_{repayment} $$

Furthermore, since all user funds are stored on-chain, for queued redemption operations, the actual share that needs to be applied for redemption from the fund is not the proportion of the entire locked tokens, but rather…

$$ Fund\_{share} \= \\frac{Token\_{share}}{Token\_{supply}}\* \\frac{Value\_{onchain} \+ Value\_{offchain}}{Value\_{offchain} }$$

## **Limitations of the trial price calculation**

We emphasize that these equations are used merely to create a trial price to bootstrap price discovery, and should be regarded as a first guess for the price of the token.  There are several limitations involved in this calculation which we will consider to improve our algorithm.

The bootstrap price results in a smooth price which continuously increases upward.  Therefore without additional work the bootstrap algorithm would result in the asset never liquidating in a lending pool regardless of market conditions.  This problem may be addressed either as market actors adjust the price or by adding a random element to the bootstrap price.

Another issue results from the use of stale data in generating a bootstrap price.  The NAV for the underlying may not be available for several weeks after a deposit or redemption transaction is undertaken, and so this may result in the bootstrap price being significantly different from the fair market value.

Finally, as AXC will be using the bootstrap price for an initial trade, there may be situations in which using the bootstrap price causes our liquidity pool to be exhausted or for the trial price to cause the token price to deviate significantly from the market value of the underlying.  We will monitor market conditions and if necessary revise our bootstrap price to deal improve our pricing.

%lang zh

# **定价与结算机制**

## **预估价格计算 (NAV Rebase)**

代币价值  
由于当前代币的价值由链上储备金池和链下底层资产共同锚定，所以代币的价格不能只依靠链下资产价格来进行处理，合理的计算方式

Pricetoken=Valueonchain+ValueoffchainSupplytoken

即代币的价格由项目净值（链上+链下）与代币供应量共同决定，其中链上价值计算如下

Valueonchain=Sharesprotocol\*Priceprotocol+ Extraprotocol  
其中协议份额代表储备金池用于质押在defi协议中锁定的代币份额，协议价格为第三方协议代币提供的价格，Protocol额外收益为可选项（部分协议除了质押获得的基础收益外还会发放额外的积分代币）。  
链下价值如下：

Valueoffchain= Rwaestimated+ Rwapending

链下价值为预估的Rwa净值与未处理的Rwa认购金额（管理员每个周期从链上提取的未被提款耗干的资金，还没有确定份额计入实际rwa价值）决定。  
链下rwa价值不再每日更新，而是基于底层资产的年化收益率反推出日化收益r，该收益计算如下

r \= (1+APY){\`365-1

当APY处于范围 7% \- 14.4%时，日化范围为0.0185%-0.0369%

计算在复利环境下，经过t天的rwa预估价值为

Rwaestimated \= Rwavalue\*(1+r)t=Rwavalue\*(1+APY)1365

其中RWA的净值会在每个月进行一次实际的更新校准，其余时刻按照当前时间与上次校准时间的差值以及设置的预估年化计算链下Rwa预估价值。  
特殊情况；  
对于按照3个月排队的方式提款的资金，链下Rwa净值会在偿还周期内资金烧毁代币时进行更新，此时的rwa净值如下  
Rwanewvalue=Rwaoldvalue\*(1+APY)1365-valuerepayment

此外，由于用户资金全部存储在链上，对于排队赎回的操作，实际需要向基金方申请赎回的份额不是整个实际锁定代币的占比，而是

Fundshare=TokenshareTokensupply\*Valueonchain+ValueoffchainValueoffchain

# %27\_settlement\_model.md

# **Settlement model**

In creating settlement models for deposits and withdrawals, we seek to remove the complexities that exist in the way the underlying alternative asset is priced.  In interacting with the token, the token holder wishes to have a single token with a single price that can be bought or sold with a single transaction.  However, the underlying fund may not have such a simple pricing structure, and it is common for an alternative asset to issue a separate class of shares for each deposit.

We take as an example a  sample underlying fund which illustrates the complex pricing model for the GROW Heritage Fund versus the Growth Yield Token.  In this pricing model each deposit creates a new class of shares which are sold at a price of 1000 USD per share.

## **Simplified fund example**

The custodian buys 100 USD of shares in January.  The pricing model of the fund is that each purchase creates a new class of shares at 1000.00 USD per share

* Class January \- 100 shares at USD 1000.0

In February the value of Class S1 shares goes up to 1500.00 USD and the custodian buys 500k USD of shares.  So the holdings at the end of February

* Class January \- 100 shares at USD 1500.00  
* Class February \- 500 shares at USD 1000.00

Note that the NAV is not known at the time that the funds are deposited.

%lang zh

**另类资产定价问题**  
另类资产存在定价难题，原因有两点：

1. 在产品买入或卖出之后，才能确定官方的净资产价值 (NAV)。  
2. 另类资产每次购买都有不同的类别。

一般来说，AXC发行的代币的目标是与净资产价值相匹配，以便代币的投资特性与底层资产相匹配，从而使代币持有者尽可能忽略代币化过程，以便做出投资决策。在创建用于存入和提取的定价模型时，我们力求最大限度地减少代币管理者所能施加的自主权。

我们可以从一个示例底层基金开始。

示例：

托管方在 1 月份购买了价值 10 万美元的股票。

S1 类——10 万股，价格为 1 美元。  
在 2 月份，S1 类的股票价值上涨至 1.50 美元，托管方又购买了价值 1000 美元的股票。因此，截至 2 月底的持有量为：

S1 类——10 万股，价格为 1.50 美元。  
S2 类——50 万股，价格为 1.00 美元。

请注意，在资金存入时，净资产价值是未知的。

%lang en

## **Basic computations (AUM/NAV)**

The AUM and NAV of the fund at the end of February can be calculated as follows if the NAV for the shares in January are valuable.

AUM \= (sum of different share classes \* NAV of each share class \+ cash) 

NAV \= AUM / number of shares

Example:

* Class January \- 100 shares each at USD 1500.00  
* Class February \- 500 shares each at USD 1000.00  
* Cash \- 50k USD

Tokens outstanding \= 350k

* AUM \= 700k USD  
* NAV \= 2.00 USD

We note that this computation is not possible if the AUM of the January shares are not known at the end of February.

%lang zh

## **基本计算（资产管理规模/净资产价值）**

资产管理规模（AUM）=（不同份额类别总数 \* 各份额类别的净资产价值 \+ 现金）

净资产价值（NAV）= 资产管理规模 / 份额总数

示例：

S1 类：10 万股，每股 1.50 美元  
S2 类：50 万股，每股 1 美元  
现金：5 万美元

已发行代币数量：35 万

资产管理规模 \= 70 万美元  
净资产价值 \= 2.00 美元

%lang en

## **Deposit settlement example**

Assume two token holders deposit funds

Example:

* Deposit \#1 \= 10k USD  
* Deposit \#2 \= 20k USD

Underlying holdings after token deposit

* Class January \- 100 shares each at USD 1500  
* Class February \- 500 shares each at USD 1000  
* Class March \- 30 shares each at USD 1000  
* Cash \- 50k USD

AUM \= 730k USD

However to calculate the NAV it will be necessary to compute the tokens that were issued on deposit.  Because the NAV of the underlying is not known at the time of deposit, the number of tokens outstanding must be determined by a pricing model at the time the tokens were purchased.

%lang zh

## **存款定价模型**

新的存款将按照当前的净资产价值转换为代币。

示例：

存款 \#1 \= 1 万美元  
存款 \#2 \= 2 万美元

创建代币

存款 \#1 \= 5 千个代币  
存款 \#2 \= 1 万个代币

代币存款后，底层资产的构成如下：

S1 类：10 万股，每股 1.50 美元  
S2 类：50 万股，每股 1 美元  
S3 类：3 万股，每股 1 美元  
现金：5 万美元

资产管理规模 \= 73 万 USDT  
已发行股份 \= 36.5 万  
净资产价值 \= 2.00

%lang en

## **Withdrawal settlement model**

The withdrawal pricing model takes into account that there are holdings divided into different classes and that the NAV is not known until the tokens are actually redeemed.  Our aim is to keep the withdrawal price at the NAV price, although this requirement may  be modified with the agreement of the client.

We will withdraw from different classes using FIFO (first in, first out).  FIFO is the standard accounting mechanism for dealing with different assets.  We estimate the number of tokens in each class to be withdrawn using an estimated NAV, and that and an extra amount to take into account any possible shift in the NAV,.  We then place an order for the tokens to be sold, and cover differences between the withdrawal price and cash via cash reserve.  In the event that cash reserve is unable to cover the difference then we perform an additional withdrawal in the next month.

For example, assume we wish to withdraw 5k tokens

So we would need to get USD 10K to cover the withdrawal.  So we would need to convert 6666.67 S1 tokens to cover the withdrawal.  However because the NAV may change it we may request a withdrawal of 8000 January tokens to cover the withdrawal in case there is an unexpected change in the NAV

Any excess withdrawals will be kept as offchain reserve.

%lang zh

## **提款定价模型**

提款定价模型考虑到持有的资产分为不同的类别，并且只有在实际赎回代币时才能确定资产净值（NAV）。我们的目标是使提款价格与资产净值价格保持一致，尽管此要求可能会在与客户协商后进行修改。

我们将使用先进先出（FIFO）原则从不同类别中进行提款。FIFO是处理不同资产的标准会计机制。我们使用估计的资产净值来估算每个类别中要提款的代币数量，并增加一个额外的金额以考虑资产净值可能发生的任何变化。然后，我们下达出售代币的订单。通过现金储备来弥补提款价格与实际收到的现金之间的差异。如果现金储备不足以弥补差异，则我们将在下个月进行额外的提款。

例如，假设我们希望提款 5000 个代币。

因此，我们需要获得 10000 美元的资金来支付提款。因此，我们需要将 6666.67 个 S1 代币转换为现金以支付提款。但是，由于资产净值可能会发生变化，我们可能会申请提款 8000 个 S1 代币，以防资产净值发生意外变化。

任何多余的提款将作为链外储备保留。

# %25\_pricing\_v2

%lang en

# Perpetual RWA Vault Subscription and Redemption Technical Solution

## I. Core Architecture Design

This solution adopts a "dual liquidity" model, dividing funds into a reserve pool and underlying assets (RWA Inventory), aiming to balance immediate liquidity and asset returns.

* **Fund Pool Division**  
  **Reserve Pool:** Of the funds users subscribe, 10% is maintained as a stablecoin share, specifically for processing platform users' Instant redemption requests.  
  **Asset Pool**: The remaining 90% of the subscribed funds are invested in underlying RWA assets (such as GYT Fund, etc.), generating continuous APY returns.

## II. Business Operation Flow

1. Deposit Process  
   **Fund Injection:** Users deposit incremental funds during the subscription window. A smart contract manages the funds according to a 90% underlying asset subscription and 10% reserve pool model.  
   **Priority Offset:** Before the underlying asset subscription period, 10% of the new subscription funds and the remaining funds in the original reserve pool are first used for pending withdrawal requests. Meanwhile, 90% of the incremental subscription funds can be used as the official reserve pool to provide funds for Instant exchange withdrawal (only after all 10% of the reserve funds are used, the new 90% of the incremental funds will be used for the current withdrawal payment). This internal netting and offsetting reduces the clearing costs of underlying assets."

%lang zh

# **永续 RWA Vault 认购与赎回技术方案**

## **一、 核心架构设计**

本方案采用“双层流动性”模型，将资金划分为**储备金池（Reserve Pool）和底层资产（RWA Inventory）**，旨在平衡即时流动性与资产收益率。

### **1\. 资金池划分**

* **储备金池 (Reserve Pool)：**用户认购的资金中， 保持 10% 的稳定币份额，专门用于处理平台用户的 **Instant（即时）** 赎回请求 。

* **资产池 (Asset Pool)：** 剩余90%的认购资金投入底层 RWA 资产（如GYT基金等），产生持续 APY 收益。

## **二、 业务运行流程**

### **1\. 存款流程 (Deposit)**

* **资金注入：** 用户在认购窗口期存入增量资金，通过智能合按照90%的底层资产认购金和10%的储备金模式进行管理。  
* **优先对冲：** 在底层资产认购期之前，新认购资金中10%的增量资金和原有储备池剩余资金优先用于系统挂起的（Pending）赎回请求，同时，90%的增量认购资金可充当官方储备金池可用于赎回Instant兑换的资金深度（只有所有10%储备金额度用完以后，才用新的90%的增量资金用于本期的赎回兑付），实现内部轧差对冲，减少底层资产的清算成本 。

%lang all

![][image8]

%lang en

Official Reserve Pool Size \= Investor's 10% reserve \+ 90% of the current period's unsubscribed funds.  
Redemption Priority: 10% Reserve \-\> 90% of the current period's unsubscribed funds.

* Surplus Handling:  
  * If, on the settlement date for underlying asset subscriptions, 90% of the newly subscribed funds for the current period have a redemption surplus, the surplus portion will be used to subscribe to the underlying RWA assets.  
  * On the settlement date for underlying asset subscriptions, idle funds in the official reserve pool are considered for collateralization in lending protocols to enhance returns.  
* Reserve Income Calculation:  
  * The 10% reserve income for users mainly comes from the following aspects:  
    * Redemption and withdrawal fee distribution.  
    * Idle lending protocol income.

## 2\. Exit Process

Exit is processed in two tiers:

* First Tier: Instant exit  
  * As long as there are exit balances in the reserve pool, users can immediately exit RWA tokens at the current day's RWA token price. At the same time, users need to calculate the total amount of their 10% reserve plus accrued interest during exit. The exit amount is then paid out, and a redemption fee is charged (as a penalty for early exit).  
  * Regarding the exit fee, the on-chain RWA token can be charged according to a uniform tiered standard, with a minimum of 2%.  
  * The instant exit fee income can be allocated by the official to X%.  
* Second Tier: Official exit (Official Channel)  
  * When the user's requested amount exceeds the reserve balance, the excess is placed in the official exit queue.  
  * This portion will be processed after the settlement cycle for the underlying assets (waiting period). The funds will be distributed after the official funds are recovered.

%lang zh

**官方储备金池额度**\= 投资者10%储备金 \+ 当期90%未认购资金

兑付优先级：10%储备金 ——\> 90%当期未认购金额

* **结余处理：**  
  * 若在底层资产认购结算日时，本期新认购增量资金的90%有赎回兑付结余，结余部分用于申购底层RWA资产。  
  * 在底层资产认购结算日时，官方储备金池闲置的资金考虑质押到借贷协议进行生息增强收益。  
* **储备金收益计算：**

         用户10%的储备金收益主要来自以下几个方面：

* 兑付赎回的手续费分红  
  * 闲时借贷协议生息收入

### **2\. 出款流程 (Exit process)**

赎回分为两个层级处理：

* **第一层：即时出款 (Instant Exit)**  
  * 只要储备金池内有赎回额度，用户可按**当天RWA Token**价格立即销毁 RWA Token ，同时，用户赎回时还需要计算用户10%储备金+生息的总金额。 累计出款金额并支付赎回手续费（作为提前赎回的违约金）  
  * 关于支付出款手续费，链上 RWA Token可以按照一个统一的收费梯度标准，不低于2%  
  * Instant出款的手续费收入，官方可以将 X%

  

* **第二层：延时出款 (Official Exit)**  
  * 当用户申请额度大于储备金余额时，超出部分进入**官方出款队列**。  
  * 该部分需等待底层资产清算周期（等待期处理），待官方资金回笼后发放。

## 

%lang en

## **III. Pricing and Settlement Mechanism**

### **1\. Estimated Price Calculation (NAV Rebase)**

Token Value: Because the current value of the token is jointly anchored by the on-chain reserve pool and the off-chain underlying assets, the token price cannot be determined solely by the price of the off-chain assets. A reasonable calculation method is:

Pricetoken=Valueonchain+ValueoffchainSupplytoken

That is, the token price is jointly determined by the project's net asset value (on-chain \+ off-chain) and the token supply. The on-chain value is calculated as follows:

Valueonchain=Sharesprotocol\*Priceprotocol+ Extraprotocol

Where the protocol share represents the proportion of the reserve pool that is staked in DeFi protocols, the protocol price is the price provided by the third-party protocol, and the protocol's additional income is optional (some protocols provide additional reward tokens in addition to the basic staking income).

Valueoffchain= Rwaestimated+ Rwapending

The off-chain value is calculated as follows: The off-chain value is determined by the estimated RWA net value and the amount of unprocessed RWA subscriptions (the amount of funds withdrawn from the on-chain by the administrator each period, which has not yet been allocated to the actual RWA value). The off-chain RWA value is no longer updated daily, but is based on the annualized return of the underlying asset to derive the daily return rate r, and the estimated RWA value after t days is calculated as follows:

r \= (1+APY){\`365-1

When the APY is in the range of 7% \- 14.4%, the daily return rate is 0.0185% \- 0.0369%.

In addition, since user funds are all stored on the chain, for redemption requests, the actual share of funds that needs to be requested from the fund is not the total amount of locked tokens.

### **2\. Subscription/Redemption Benchmark**

* All transactions are based on the Exchange Rate (estimated price) of the date of the request, ensuring fairness and preventing price fluctuation arbitrage.

## **IV. Key Technical Parameters**

| Parameter | Description | Suggested Configuration |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Reserve Ratio (RRR) | Funds required to support instant redemption | 10% |
| Redemption Window | Settlement cycle for the official redemption channel | Depends on underlying assets |
| Matching Frequency | Frequency of automatic matching of subscription and redemption funds | End of each subscription window |
| NAV Update | Calibration of RWA token calculation parameters after underlying asset updates | Monthly |

## **V. Scheme Advantages**

1. **High Liquidity:** As long as there are continuous new subscriptions, old users can achieve near-instant zero-wait redemption.  
2. **Reduced Losses:** The internal matching mechanism greatly reduces the currency transfer fees and brokerage fees incurred by frequent subscriptions and redemptions of underlying assets.  
3. **Flexible Reinvestment:** Surplus funds are automatically re-subscribed, ensuring maximum capital utilization.  
4. **Income Aggregation:** Funds in the official reserve can be combined with on-chain DeFi income-generating protocols before triggering redemption requests.

%lang zh

## **三、 定价与结算机制**

### **1\. 预估价格计算 (NAV Rebase)**

代币价值  
由于当前代币的价值由链上储备金池和链下底层资产共同锚定，所以代币的价格不能只依靠链下资产价格来进行处理，合理的计算方式

Pricetoken=Valueonchain+ValueoffchainSupplytoken

即代币的价格由项目净值（链上+链下）与代币供应量共同决定，其中链上价值计算如下

Valueonchain=Sharesprotocol\*Priceprotocol+ Extraprotocol  
其中协议份额代表储备金池用于质押在defi协议中锁定的代币份额，协议价格为第三方协议代币提供的价格，Protocol额外收益为可选项（部分协议除了质押获得的基础收益外还会发放额外的积分代币）。  
链下价值如下：

Valueoffchain= Rwaestimated+ Rwapending

链下价值为预估的Rwa净值与未处理的Rwa认购金额（管理员每个周期从链上提取的未被提款耗干的资金，还没有确定份额计入实际rwa价值）决定。  
链下rwa价值不再每日更新，而是基于底层资产的年化收益率反推出日化收益r，该收益计算如下

r \= (1+APY){\`365-1

当APY处于范围 7% \- 14.4%时，日化范围为0.0185%-0.0369%

计算在复利环境下，经过t天的rwa预估价值为

Rwaestimated \= Rwavalue\*(1+r)t=Rwavalue\*(1+APY)1365

其中RWA的净值会在每个月进行一次实际的更新校准，其余时刻按照当前时间与上次校准时间的差值以及设置的预估年化计算链下Rwa预估价值。  
特殊情况；  
对于按照3个月排队的方式提款的资金，链下Rwa净值会在偿还周期内资金烧毁代币时进行更新，此时的rwa净值如下  
Rwanewvalue=Rwaoldvalue\*(1+APY)1365-valuerepayment

此外，由于用户资金全部存储在链上，对于排队赎回的操作，实际需要向基金方申请赎回的份额不是整个实际锁定代币的占比，而是

Fundshare=TokenshareTokensupply\*Valueonchain+ValueoffchainValueoffchain

### **2\. 认购/赎回基准**

* 所有交易均以**发起请求当天**的 ExchangeRate（预估价格）作为结算基准，确保公平性并防止价格波动套利。

## **四、 关键技术参数** 

| 参数 | 说明 | 建议配置 |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **储备金率 (RRR)** | 维持即时赎回所需的资金比例 | 10%  |
| **赎回窗口** | 官方赎回通道的结算周期 | 取决于底层资产业务 |
| **对冲频率** | 认购资金与赎回队列的自动轧差频率 | 每个认购窗口期末 |
| **净值更新** | 底层资产更新后，校准资产RWA Token计算参数 | 每个月校准一次 |

## **五、 方案优势**

1. **高流动性：** 只要有持续的增量认购，老用户即可实现近乎即时的零等待退出。  
2. **降低损耗：** 内部对冲机制极大减少了频繁申购和赎回底层资产产生的法币转账费及经纪商佣金。  
3. **灵活复投：** 结余资金自动申购，确保资本利用率最大化 。  
4. **收益聚合：**官方储备金里的资金，在触发赎回兑付请求之前，可以和链上Defi生息协议进行结合

---

**提示：** 已为您生成内容摘要。如需进一步将此完整方案导出为正式的 Google 文档，请确认您的账号权限。

%

# %40\_user\_rights.md

# **User** 

Users are one of the two types of token holders, and have the following characteristics

* A user can be a legal person or can be a smart contract entity, such as a wallet, with no legal personhood.  
* Token holder user are not required for AML/KYC and wallet address whitelisting.   
* The legal relationship is governed by General Terms and Conditions and applicable laws with limited legal recourse.  
* Token holder user will indirectly participate in the performance (Economic exposure) of the underlying.  
* Token issuers undertakes to use funds for investment in underlying  
  * No right to convert tokens  
  * Token issuer subject to anti-fraud/anti-scam laws  
  * Token holder entitled to share of underlying assets in case of liquidation  
* Tokenholder rights analogous to structured product or LP in fund  
* No restrictions on transferability  
* No trust, fiduciary, or beneficial ownership relationship  
* Deposits and withdraws in crypto

# %42\_investor\_rights.md

# **Investor**

An investor is another type of token holder.

* Token holder investor is a legal person and a PI or Accredited investors based on respective jurisdictions (for example a natural person or corporation). Currently only available to users located in supported jurisdictions.  
* Token holder investor must undergo AML/KYC and wallet address whitelisting.   
* The legal relationship is governed by legal contract addendum and General Terms & Conditions with strong legal recourse.  
* Token holder user will directly participate in the performance (Economic exposure) of the underlying   
* Strong legal recourse  
  * Investors have the legal right to convert tokens to cash  
  * Token holders have creditor rights against token issuer include right to force involuntary administration  
  * Legal right enforceable via arbitration award through international recognized arbitration panel  
  * Token issuer subject to anti-fraud/anti-scam laws  
  * Token holder entitled to share of underlying assets in case of liquidation  
* The tokens issued to investors cannot be transferred directly to other token holders.  
* Tokens must be purchased and redeemed in fiat currency

# %45\_legal.md

%lang en

# **Legal structure**

The legal structure for the issuance of AXC tokens is specifically designed to enhance the transferability and financial privacy associated with the tokens while providing tokenholders  exposure to the returns of the underlying as well as the access to the value of the tokens in case of liquidation.

The basic structure of the AXC token is as follows

%lang zh

# **法律结构**

AXC 代币的法律结构经过专门设计，旨在提高代币的可转让性和财务隐私，同时为投资者提供对底层资产收益的参与机会，并在清算时提供对代币价值的获取途径。

AXC 代币的基本结构如下：

%lang all

![][image9]

%lang en

The generalized legal structure shown above highlights the tokenization structure for all assets that AXC assists in bringing to market. Shares of the underlying asset are purchased from an asset manager and fully owned by a Series DAO LLC, which operates under a Master DAO LLC. In the case of Growth Yield Token, the Master DAO is RWAfi DAO LLC, which is currently a non-profit filed with just one member. The Series DAO (In this case RWAfi DAO LLC \- Series 1\) then issues tokens that attempt to track the value of the underlying, but never grants ownership or legal recourse to tokenholders. This process is done with the technical support provided by AXC, who acts as the “Token Service Provider”, and receives a 1% management fee for operating the token-related platform.

| Actor (In Chart) | Entity | Role | Legal Domicile |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Master/Series  DAO LLC** | RWAfi DAO LLC / RWAfi DAO LLC \- Series 1 | Master sets  up Series LLC’s to hold assets and has direct relationship with custodianSeries has beneficial ownership of underlying asset | Marshall Islands |
| **Token Service Provider** | AXC | Provides technical support in connection with  issuance and management of tokens \- receives 1% management fee | Hong Kong |
| **Underlying** | See product sheet for asset manager | Asset manager (FoHF here) | HK Open Fund Company |
| **Custodian** | See product sheet for custodian | Broker-dealer relationship/holds cash | HK Trust company |

## **Legal agreements**

The legal structure highlighted earlier is governed by a series of contracts between entities and relevant parties.

| Contract | Parties | Description |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Terms and conditions contract | Token holders and Series LLC | Governs obligations to tokenholders |
| Token memorandum | Token holders and Series LLC | Governs use of funds for the token |
| Custody/Ownership contract | Master LLC and Series LLC | Permits Master LLC to act on behalf of Series |
| Blockchain services Contract | Series LLC and AXC | Permits AXC to provide services to Series LLC |
| Custodial account | Master LLC and Custodian | Trust account agreement |

* **Terms and conditions:** Emphasizes high investment and legal risk, non-custodial token structure, no equity or ownership rights, broad transfer and jurisdictional restrictions, and strong limitations on issuer liability with Marshall Islands law and HKIAC arbitration governing disputes.  
* **Token memorandum:** Describes an ERC‑20 token that economically tracks a fund by the issuer holding its shares, allows only indirect participation (no right to receive underlying securities), permits liquidity and fee management that can cause imperfect tracking, and highlights significant market, liquidity, and underlying-asset risks.  
* **Custody/Ownership contract:** Clarifies that series assets (cash, tokens, underlying securities, and proceeds) are beneficially owned by the specific series even if legally titled in the master company’s name, must be segregated and not used for other series or master‑level liabilities, and must be re‑titled back to the series on termination with Marshall Islands/Delaware‑reference law governing.  
* **Blockchain services contract:** Appoints a non‑fiduciary token services provider on a non‑exclusive basis, sets flexible fee mechanics (including unilateral changes with a termination right), heavily limits liability except for negligence or fraud, and uses a force‑majeure and HKIAC arbitration framework under Marshall Islands/Delaware‑reference law.  
* **Custodial account:** Opens a Hong Kong institutional/professional investor securities account (cash/margin/options/futures) with a licensed custodian, where the client accepts product risk disclosures (including derivatives), agrees that the broker may suspend the account and request information for suspicious activity.

## 

## **Takeaways**

### **Special purpose vehicle (SPV) structure**

Each separate fund is set up as a separate Marshall Island series LLC which contains only the underlying and has no contracts other than with token holders, the custodian, or service providers.  To reduce risks associated with recognition of the master/series structure, all of the series holdings are long only.

### **Bankruptcy remoteness**

The legal structure is intended to be bankruptcy remote and isolates the assets in one fund from claims against the service provider or from other funds.  All assets are held in a special purpose vehicle (SPV) consisting of Marshall Islands Master/Series DAO LLC.  This SPV contains only assets and incurs no material liabilities (except any withdrawal or rights attaching to the tokens), and there is a legal separation between the SPV and any service providers.  All accounts and holders in relation to the assets held by the SPV are in the name of the Master/Series DAO LLC, and any service providers have no ownership or collateral rights to the assets in the LLC.

Separation between different funds is accomplished by a Series DAO LLC structure in which each fund has a separate balance sheet under Marshall Island law.  To mitigate legal risks from possible non-recognition of the series structure, the master/series structure will be used in long-only funds in which potential token holder claims cannot exceed the assets available in a series fund.  In situations where the fund undertakes strategies in which there is any possibility of excess liability, a separate master DAO LLC with separate custody accounts will be used.

Bankruptcy remoteness from custodians will be undertaken by ensuring that beneficial ownership of all assets will remain with the SPV, and that all custodians are licensed to undertake the trust business.

### **Liquidation rights**

Both the General Terms and Conditions and the Investor addendum provide that the token holders will be entitled to a pro-rata share of assets held by the SPV in the event of SPV liquidation. 

%lang zh

上述的通用法律结构突出了 AXC 协助推出的所有资产的代币化结构。从资产管理公司购买底层资产的股份，并由一个系列 DAO 有限责任公司完全拥有，该系列 DAO 有限责任公司受一个主 DAO 有限责任公司的管辖。对于增长收益代币，主 DAO 是 RWAfi DAO 有限责任公司，目前是一个只拥有一个成员的非营利组织。然后，系列 DAO（在本例中为 RWAfi DAO 有限责任公司 \- 系列 1）发行代币，这些代币旨在追踪底层资产的价值，但不授予代币持有者所有权或法律追索权。此过程由 AXC 提供技术支持，AXC 充当“代币服务提供商”，并收取 1% 的管理费，以运营与代币相关的平台。

| 图表中的参与者 | 实体 | 角色 | 法律注册地 |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **主/系列 DAO 有限责任公司** | RWAfi DAO 有限责任公司 / RWAfi DAO 有限责任公司 \- 系列 1 | 主 DAO 设立系列 LLC 以持有资产，并与托管人建立直接关系；系列 DAO 拥有对底层资产的实益所有权 | 马绍尔群岛 |
| **代币服务提供商** | AXC | 提供与代币发行和管理相关的技术支持，收取 1% 的管理费 | 香港 |
| **底层资产** | GROW 资产管理香港有限公司 | 资产管理公司（此处为基金的基金） | 香港开放式基金公司 |
| **托管人** |  | 经纪-交易商关系/持有现金 | 香港信托公司 |

### **法律协议**

上述法律结构受一系列实体和相关各方之间的合同约束。

| 合同 | 当事人 | 描述 |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| 条款与条件合同 | 代币持有者和系列 LLC | 规定了对代币持有者的义务 |
| 代币备忘录 | 代币持有者和系列 LLC | 规定了代币的资金用途 |
| 托管/所有权合同 | 主 LLC 和系列 LLC | 允许主 LLC 代表系列 LLC 行动 |
| 区块链服务合同 | 系列 LLC 和 AXC | 允许 AXC 向系列 LLC 提供服务 |
| 托管账户 | 主 LLC 和财富经纪公司 | 托管账户协议 |

**主要结论：**

* **底层资产的特殊目的公司 (SPV)：** 每个单独的基金都作为一个独立的马绍尔群岛系列 LLC 设立，其中仅包含底层资产，并且除了与代币持有者、托管人或服务提供商之外，没有其他合同。为了降低与主/系列结构的认可相关的风险，所有系列持有的资产均为长期持有。  
* **隔离于破产风险：** 法律结构旨在隔离于破产风险，并将一个基金中的资产与对服务提供商或其他基金的索赔隔离。所有资产均由一个特殊目的公司 (SPV) 持有，该 SPV 由马绍尔群岛主/系列 DAO 有限责任公司组成。此 SPV 仅包含资产，并且不承担任何重大负债（除非是与代币相关的任何提款或权利），并且 SPV 与任何服务提供商之间存在法律上的分离。所有与 SPV 持有的资产相关的账户和持有人均以主/系列 DAO 有限责任公司的名义进行。

不同基金之间的分离是通过系列 DAO 有限责任公司结构来实现的，在该结构中，每个基金均在马绍尔群岛法律下拥有独立的资产负债表。为了减轻由于可能不认可系列结构而产生的法律风险，主/系列结构将用于仅长期持有的基金，在这种基金中，潜在的代币持有者索赔不能超过一个系列基金中的资产。在基金采取任何可能存在超额负债的策略时，将使用一个单独的主 DAO 有限责任公司和单独的托管账户。  
通过确保所有资产的实益所有权仍由 SPV 拥有，并且所有托管人均获得进行信托业务的许可，从而实现与托管人的破产隔离。

* **清算权利：** 总体条款与条件以及投资者附录均规定，在 SPV 清算时，代币持有者有权获得 SPV 持有资产的按比例份额。  
* **条款与条件：** 强调高投资和法律风险、非托管的代币结构、不具备任何股权或所有权、广泛的转让和管辖权限制，以及对发行人责任的严格限制，并由马绍尔群岛法律和香港国际仲裁中心仲裁管辖争议。  
* **代币备忘录：** 描述了一种 ERC-20 代币，该代币通过发行人持有其股份来经济性地追踪基金，仅允许间接参与（无权获得底层证券），允许流动性和费用管理，这可能会导致不完全的追踪，并强调了重大的市场、流动性和底层资产风险。  
* **托管/所有权合同：** 澄清了系列资产（现金、代币、底层证券和收益）由特定的系列拥有，即使在法律上以主公司的名义所有，也必须进行隔离，不能用于其他系列或主级别的负债，并且在终止时必须重新转回该系列，并以马绍尔群岛/特拉华州的法律为依据。  
* **区块链服务合同：** 指定一个非信托的代币服务提供商，以非独家方式提供服务，设定灵活的费用机制（包括单方面变更，并具有终止权），严格限制责任，除非存在疏忽或欺诈行为，并使用马绍尔群岛/特拉华州的法律作为依据，采用不可抗力和香港国际仲裁中心仲裁框架。  
* **托管账户：** 在获得许可的托管人处开设香港机构/专业投资者证券账户（现金/保证金/期权/期货），客户接受产品风险披露（包括衍生品），同意经纪商可以暂停账户并要求提供有关可

# %48\_reporting.md

# **Reporting and transparency**

In order to provide the token holder with the information to make investment decisions, the token issuer provides regular attestation reports to token holders regarding the assets held by the token issuer.  The token attestation reports contain three information elements:

* Tokens which have been issued  
* Assets held by the token holder  
* Valuation of the assets held by the token holder

The information for the reports can be taken from on-chain and off-chain sources.  On-chain information can immediately be read from the blockchain.  Off chain sources require information from third parties whose supporting documents will be available to token holding.  The latency on the information of assets held by the token issuer will be provided by custodians and can be provided within T+5 business days of subscription and redemption dates.   Information on the valuation of off-chain assets may take longer to process and may be delayed to T+45 business days.

# %50\_smart\_contracts.md

# **Smart contracts**

Our smart contracts are written according to the ERC20 contract standard and have been audited by Certik.

# %52\_ai\_open\_source.md

# **AI and Open Source**

AXC makes extensive use of AI and Open Source and much of our code base is available at [https://github.com/accelerate-protocol/](https://github.com/accelerate-protocol/)

Our use of AI is primarily focused on optimizing internal processes, and we make extensive use of AI models and skills in order for internal document processing and internal risk management.

We also use open source products such as Jupyter and python for internal calculation purposes.

# %60\_disclaimers.md

# Disclaimers

The purpose of this document is to document the governance and operations for the AXC token issuance framework. 

**THIS DOCUMENT IS INTENDED FOR INFORMATIONAL AND EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY AND DOES NOT CONSTITUTE AN INVITATION OR OFFER TO ACQUIRE, PURCHASE OR SUBSCRIBE FOR SECURITIES/ INVESTMENT PRODUCT OR AN INVITATION TO ENTER INTO ANY AGREEMENT TO DO ANY SUCH THINGS, NOR IS IT CALCULATED TO INVITE ANY OFFER TO ACQUIRE, PURCHASE OR SUBSCRIBE FOR ANY SECURITIES/ INVESTMENT PRODUCT. NEITHER THIS DOCUMENT NOR ANYTHING REFERRED TO HEREIN FORMS THE BASIS FOR ANY CONTRACT OR COMMITMENT WHATSOEVER.**

**NOTHING IN THIS DOCUMENT SHOULD BE CONSTRUED AS A WARRANTY OR REPRESENTATION OR TO CREATE ANY OBLIGATION, CONTRACTUAL OR OTHERWISE, ON THE PART OF AXC OR AFFILIATES.** 

**THE TOKENS REFERRED TO HEREIN ARE INTENDED FOR PURCHASE BY ELIGIBLE PROFESSIONAL, INSTITUTIONAL, ACCREDITED, OR QUALIFIED INVESTORS ONLY, AS DETERMINED BY APPLICABLE LAWS IN EACH RELEVANT JURISDICTION. ACCORDINGLY, THE TOKENS REFERRED TO HEREIN ARE NOT APPROPRIATE AS AN INVESTMENT FOR RETAIL INVESTORS.**
